{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's void key
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon's void key]] can release launcher constructs.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] used treasures from [[Lindon's void key]] to advance.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
